MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Jeffrey Chen, Esq. for Plaintiff: Benny Wong, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Tat Choy Ho dba Fay Tat Construction Co., as follows:
Damages $83,200.00
Costs $327.50 for a total of $83,527.50
Judgment signed in open court.
